iteration_1.notes: Baseline with original verbose skill. sql-query failed basic-queries (1/3): model returned objects instead of simple values for top_customer and product_ranking fields in JSON output.

iteration_2.notes: Optimized skill focused on SQLite, explicit JSON format rules, CSV import with pre-created typed tables, and normalization patterns. Both tasks pass consistently.

iteration_3_confirmation.notes: Confirmation run. Both tasks pass consistently.

changes: Removed PostgreSQL, MySQL, backup/restore, and migration script sections (not needed for SQLite-only tasks)
Added critical CSV import pattern: create table with explicit types BEFORE .import to avoid all-TEXT columns
Added explicit JSON format rules: scalar values vs arrays vs objects, with examples showing when to use each
Added data normalization pattern showing raw CSV → normalized relational tables workflow
Reduced skill size from ~430 lines to ~140 lines for faster processing by smaller model
